title: unicode-math
description: A XeTeX document using \usepackage{unicode-math} + \setmathfont to typeset real Unicode math with an OpenType math font (Latin Modern Math, from academic's fontsrecommended set). 'unicode-math' IS a provided-package name in the academic tier, so the §5.4(a) static scan preselects + mounts academic BEFORE pass 1 (resolution=scan). Unlike a CJK CID subset, xdvipdfmx writes a ToUnicode CMap for this OTF math font, so the math ROUND-TRIPS: the recovered text contains the actual Unicode operators — the integral (U+222B), infinity (U+221E), n-ary summation (U+2211) and square root (U+221A) glyphs are asserted directly, proving real math rendered (not a pixel comparison, §8). Structurally corroborated: the LatinModernMath program is embedded (self-contained PDF) with a CID glyph run.
